title: Babies Breath 2.5cm Small Artificial Pearl Flowers Pale Blue (72 Pack)
features: 2.5cm diameter fabric flowers beautifully crafted from satin and organza material
9 colour co-ordinating pearl stamens on each flower
10cm wired stem wrapped in white paper florist tape
Perfect bouquet filler, cake decoration, card making accessory or scrapbooking embellishment
description: Pack of 72 stems of fabric Baby's Breath in the colour of Pale Blue. Fabric flower with pearl stamen measuring approximately 2 cm. Paper covered wire stem wire stem measure approximately 9 cm Note: Image shows only 12 stems.
